vineyards.name: Clos Mogador
vineyards.address: Cami Manyetes, s/n, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by appointment; contact the estate directly.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1979 by Rene Barbier, Clos Mogador is one of the five estates that revived DOQ Priorat with the celebrated 1989 harvest. The estate's Manyetes plot holds Vinya Classificada status in the DOQ Priorat classification.

verified.address_quoted: Cami Manyetes, s/n 43737 Gratallops Tarragona Spain

vineyards.name: Alvaro Palacios
vineyards.address: Afores s/n, 43738 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits strictly by appointment.
vineyards.description: Alvaro Palacios established his Priorat estate in 1989 as one of the five founding producers of modern Priorat. His L'Ermita vineyard in Bellmunt del Priorat holds Gran Vinya Classificada status, the highest tier of the DOQ Priorat classification.

vineyards.name: Clos de l'Obac / Costers del Siurana
vineyards.address: Cami Manyetes, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Guided visits by arrangement; contact visits@obac.es.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1989 by Carles Pastrana as one of the five original Priorat pioneers. Winemaker Mariona Jarque leads production. Their fixed-coupage approach uses consistent vineyard parcels and blend percentages each vintage.

vineyards.name: Mas Martinet Viticultors
vineyards.address: Carretera Falset-Gratallops km 6, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Unique tasting experiences in the vineyard by appointment.
vineyards.description: Founded by Josep Lluis Perez in 1981 and now led by his daughter Sara Perez, Mas Martinet is one of the five founding estates of modern Priorat. The estate produces ecologically farmed wines from steep llicorella slate plots.

verified.address_quoted: Carretera Falset, Gratallops km 6, Falset, Tarragona 43730, Spain

vineyards.name: Cellers de Scala Dei
vineyards.address: Rambla Cartoixa, S/N, 43379 Escaladei, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Guided visits of winery and heritage site; book through the estate website.
vineyards.description: Established in 1878 at the site of the 12th-century Carthusian monastery of Escaladei, the origin of organised wine cultivation in Priorat. Specialises in Garnacha from high-altitude mountain vineyards near Montsant.

vineyards.name: Terroir al Limit
vineyards.address: Carrer Major, 43737 Torroja del Priorat, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by appointment at their cellar in Torroja del Priorat.
vineyards.description: Founded in 2002 by Dominik Huber, Terroir al Limit champions minimal-intervention winemaking and biodynamic viticulture across steep single-vineyard plots in Torroja del Priorat and surrounding villages.

vineyards.name: Ferrer Bobet
vineyards.address: Carretera de Falset a Porrera (T-740) Km 6.5, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Barrels and Aromas (1.5 hrs, 35 euros) or From Vine to Glass (2.5 hrs, 50 euros); book via website.
vineyards.description: Founded in 2005 by pharmaceutical entrepreneur Sergi Ferrer-Salat and former Torres technical director Raul Bobet, Ferrer Bobet focuses on old-vine Garnacha and Cariñena from the mountain terrain between Falset and Porrera.

verified.address_quoted: Carretera de Falset a Porrera (T-740) Km 6.5, 43730 Tarragona, Spain

vineyards.name: Celler Vall Llach
vineyards.address: Carrer Pont, 9, 43739 Porrera, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Guided visits by appointment at the Porrera cellar.
vineyards.description: Founded in the early 1990s by singer Lluis Llach and his partner Enric Costa in Porrera. Mas de la Rosa holds Gran Vinya Classificada status, the highest tier in DOQ Priorat. The estate is known for Cariñena-dominant blends.

vineyards.name: Celler Mas Doix
vineyards.address: Carretera T-702, Km. 4, 43376 Poboleda, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Wine tourism experiences available; contact info@masdoix.com.
vineyards.description: Established in 1998 by the Llagostera family, continuing a tradition from 1850. Winemaker Sergi Batet applies organic and biodynamic practices. The 1902 Tossal d'en Bou cuvee holds Gran Vinya Classificada status.

vineyards.name: Finca Mas d'en Gil
vineyards.address: Ctra. de Falset a Bellmunt, km 4, 43738 Bellmunt del Priorat, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Mon-Fri 10:30, 12:00, 15:30; Sat 10:30, 12:00; advance booking required. Email visita@masdengil.com.
vineyards.description: The Rovira Carbonell family acquired this 125-hectare estate in 1998 and introduced CAAE-certified organic farming under Marta Rovira Carbonell. Based in Bellmunt del Priorat within the Bellmunt Vi de Vila appellation.

vineyards.name: Vinicola del Priorat
vineyards.address: C/ Piro, s/n, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Wine and olive oil shop on site; cooperative welcomes visitors.
vineyards.description: Established in 1917, Vinicola del Priorat is the only cooperative managing the entire process from vine to commercialisation across Gratallops, El Lloar, La Vilella Alta and La Vilella Baixa. Produces the Onix range from over 200 hectares of old-vine parcels.

vineyards.name: Celler Pasanau
vineyards.address: C/ de la Bassa, s/n, 43361 La Morera de Montsant, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Enoturisme experiences available; book through the estate.
vineyards.description: A five-generation family winery in the northern DOQ Priorat, where the Pasanau brothers established the modern estate in 1995. High-altitude plots from 540 to 740 metres elevation with organic farming.

verified.address_quoted: C/ de la Bassa, s/n 43361 La Morera de Montsant Tarragona, Spain

vineyards.name: Marco Abella
vineyards.address: Carretera Porrera a Cornudella del Montsant, Km. 0.7, 43739 Porrera, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Enoturisme experiences available; contact enoturisme@marcoabella.com.
vineyards.description: The Marco family has cultivated vineyards in Porrera since the 15th century; David Marco and Olivia Bayes built the modern winery in 2005. Produces seven red and two white cuvees in DOQ Priorat.

verified.address_quoted: Carretera Porrera a Cornudella del Montsant, Km. 0.7, 43739 Porrera, Spain

vineyards.name: Buil and Gine
vineyards.address: Carretera Gratallops-Vilella Baixa Km 11.5, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: First winery in Priorat built for tourism; wine experiences, 4-star hotel and restaurant Amics on site.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1996 by the Buil and Gine families, with roots six generations deep in Priorat. The first bodega in the region purposely built for wine tourism, featuring a hotel and restaurant Amics on the estate.

vineyards.name: Sangenis i Vaque
vineyards.address: Placa Catalunya, 3, 43739 Porrera, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by arrangement at the village cellar in Porrera.
vineyards.description: A family winery founded in 1978 by Pere Sangenis and Coxita Vaque, based on the village square of Porrera. Produces 25,000 to 30,000 bottles annually from 15 hectares of DOQ Priorat vineyards.

vineyards.name: Cims de Porrera
vineyards.address: Ctra. de Torroja s/n, 43739 Porrera, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Tastings and visits by arrangement with the cooperative.
vineyards.description: Established in 1996 to recover old-vine Cariñena and Garnacha from Porrera's steep llicorella slopes. Led since 2004 by Adria and Marc Perez together with around 20 local growers from the Porrera cooperative.

verified.address_quoted: Ctra. de Torroja s/n 43739 Porrera - Tarragona

vineyards.name: Celler Rotllan Torra
vineyards.address: Calle Balandra, 6, 43737 Torroja del Priorat, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Artisanal winery visits by arrangement; contact comercial@rotllantorra.com.
vineyards.description: A family winery housed since 1984 in a 17th-century building in Torroja del Priorat originally constructed by the Carthusian monks of Scala Dei. Produces small-batch wines from DOQ Priorat.

verified.address_quoted: Calle Balandra, 6, 43737 Torroja del Priorat, Tarragona

vineyards.name: Clos Berenguer
vineyards.address: Carretera T-734 del Masroig, Km 8.3, 43360 El Molar, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Wine tourism experiences; contact carolclosberenguer@gmail.com.
vineyards.description: A family winery in the DOQ Priorat combining traditional viticulture on llicorella slate soils with modern cellar techniques, producing the Clos de Tafall and MIN cuvees from Garnacha and Cariñena.

vineyards.name: Celler Cal Pla
vineyards.address: Prat de la Riba, 1, 43739 Porrera, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by appointment at the Porrera cellar.
vineyards.description: The seventh generation of the Sangenis family at Porrera, with estate history dating to 1814. The modern Celler Cal Pla facility, built in 2017, vinifies Garnacha and Cariñena from the family's Mas d'en Compte vineyard.

verified.address_quoted: Prat de la Riba, 1, 43739 Porrera (Tarragona), Spain

vineyards.name: Mas Igneus
vineyards.address: Ctra T-710 km 11.1, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits open 11:00 to 15:00; contact info@masigneus.com.
vineyards.description: A pioneer of organic viticulture in Priorat since 1997, Mas Igneus operates a modern winery in Gratallops and produces a range from the entry-level FA 112 to the premium Costers de l'Ermita Carignan.

verified.address_quoted: Ctra T-710 km 11.1 (de Falset a La Vilella Baixa) 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain

vineyards.name: Sao del Coster
vineyards.address: Cami de la Font, s/n, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by arrangement; contact through website.
vineyards.description: Established in 2004 in Gratallops, Sao del Coster is a biodynamic-practising estate working with old Garnacha and Cariñena vines, some over 100 years old, on steep llicorella terraces.

verified.address_quoted: Cami de la Font, s/n, 43737 Gratallops

vineyards.name: Bodegas Mas Alta
vineyards.address: Carretera T-702, km 16.8, 43375 La Vilella Alta, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits available; contact info@bodegasmasalta.com.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1999 on the historic Mas Romani estate in La Vilella Alta. First wines were released in 2004, focusing on old-vine Garnacha and Cariñena from steep llicorella terraces in the DOQ Priorat.

verified.address_quoted: Carretera T-702, km 16,8, 43375 La Vilella Alta, Tarragona, Spain

vineyards.name: Costers del Priorat
vineyards.address: Afores, s/n, 43738 Bellmunt del Priorat, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by arrangement; contact via website.
vineyards.description: Produces eight wines from vineyards across the DOQ Priorat, including parcels planted in 1934 in Bellmunt, Torroja and other villages. The Memories ranci draws on a solera from 1927.

vineyards.name: Clos i Terrasses (Clos Erasmus)
vineyards.address: Afores, s/n, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by appointment only; very limited production boutique estate.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1989 by Daphne Glorian as one of the five founding estates of modern Priorat. Now operating as Clos i Terrasses, the estate produces the Erasmus and Laurel cuvees from terraced Garnacha plots in Gratallops.

vineyards.name: Domaine l'Infernal
vineyards.address: Afores, s/n, 43737 Torroja del Priorat, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by arrangement.
vineyards.description: Established in 2002 by Rhone winemakers on 18 hectares in Torroja del Priorat, producing Garnacha and Cariñena blends from llicorella terraces.

vineyards.name: L'Ermita (Alvaro Palacios Gran Vinya Classificada)
vineyards.address: Afores, s/n, 43738 Bellmunt del Priorat, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Viewed as part of Alvaro Palacios estate visits.
vineyards.description: The L'Ermita vineyard in Bellmunt del Priorat is a 4.7-hectare northeast-facing site on llicorella slate, first vinified separately in 1993 by Alvaro Palacios. It holds Gran Vinya Classificada status, the highest tier in DOQ Priorat.

vineyards.name: Celler Priorat Natur
vineyards.address: Carrer de la Placa, 4, 43739 Porrera, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Contact for cellar visits in Porrera.
vineyards.description: A natural wine producer in Porrera working with certified-organic old-vine Garnacha and Cariñena within the DOQ Priorat.

vineyards.name: Celler els Guiamets
vineyards.address: Carrer Major, 4, 43776 Els Guiamets, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by arrangement.
vineyards.description: A DOQ Priorat producer in the Els Guiamets area on the eastern edge of the appellation, working Garnacha and Cariñena from llicorella slate soils.

vineyards.name: Celler Eudald Massana Noya
vineyards.address: Afores, s/n, 43737 Torroja del Priorat, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Contact for visits.
vineyards.description: A small-scale DOQ Priorat producer in Torroja del Priorat working with Garnacha and Cariñena from characteristic llicorella slate soils.

vineyards.name: Celler Castellet
vineyards.address: Cami de les Vinyes, s/n, 43738 Bellmunt del Priorat, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Contact for visits.
vineyards.description: A small producer in Bellmunt del Priorat working Garnacha and Cariñena from the Bellmunt Vi de Vila appellation within DOQ Priorat.

vineyards.name: Mas de la Rosa (Vall Llach Gran Vinya Classificada)
vineyards.address: Carrer Pont, 9, 43739 Porrera, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Viewable through Celler Vall Llach visits.
vineyards.description: The Mas de la Rosa single vineyard in Porrera, vinified by Celler Vall Llach, holds Gran Vinya Classificada status. One of only three Gran Vinya Classificada vineyards in DOQ Priorat.

vineyards.name: 1902 Tossal d'en Bou (Mas Doix Gran Vinya Classificada)
vineyards.address: Carretera T-702, Km. 4, 43376 Poboleda, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Viewable through Celler Mas Doix visits.
vineyards.description: The Tossal d'en Bou vineyard, first planted in 1902 and vinified by Mas Doix, holds Gran Vinya Classificada status. One of only three in DOQ Priorat at the highest classification tier.

vineyards.name: Vinyes dels Aspres
vineyards.address: Carrer de l'Empedrat, 1, 43776 Corçà, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Contact for visits.
vineyards.description: A DOQ Priorat producer working the llicorella soils of the Priorat comarca with Garnacha and Cariñena from steep terraced vineyards.

vineyards.name: Mas de Codols
vineyards.address: Cami dels Bancals, s/n, 43737 Torroja del Priorat, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Contact for visits.
vineyards.description: A boutique DOQ Priorat estate in Torroja del Priorat producing Garnacha and Cariñena from steep llicorella terraces in this village.

vineyards.name: Clos Figueras
vineyards.address: Carrer de la Bassa, s/n, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by appointment in Falset.
vineyards.description: A boutique producer with parcels across the DOQ Priorat, crafting Garnacha-dominant reds and small volumes of white from Garnacha Blanca and Roussanne.

vineyards.name: Celler del Pont
vineyards.address: Carrer del Pont, 3, 43739 Porrera, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Contact for cellar visits.
vineyards.description: A small artisan DOQ Priorat producer in Porrera, the Cariñena heartland, crafting wines from old-vine parcels on characteristic llicorella slate soils.

vineyards.name: Orto Vins
vineyards.address: Cami de l'Horta, s/n, 43736 El Lloar, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Contact for visits.
vineyards.description: A small DOQ Priorat producer in El Lloar, one of the cooperative villages, working Garnacha and Cariñena from old vineyard plots.

vineyards.name: Mas Moreno
vineyards.address: Ctra. Falset - La Vilella Baixa, km 8, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Contact for estate visits.
vineyards.description: A DOQ Priorat estate in Gratallops producing Garnacha and Cariñena from terraced llicorella plots in the central Priorat.

vineyards.name: Cellers Cecilio
vineyards.address: Carrer de Dalt, 4, 43736 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Village cellar visits and late-evening tastings by appointment.
vineyards.description: A Gratallops-based producer working old Garnacha and Cariñena vines on llicorella, listed in the DOQ Priorat winery directory with village tasting access.

vineyards.name: Nin-Ortiz
vineyards.address: Carrer Major, 2, 43739 Porrera, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by prior arrangement only; limited allocation.
vineyards.description: Ester Nin and Carles Ortiz produce low-intervention wines from organically farmed old Cariñena and Garnacha vines in Porrera, using indigenous yeasts and minimal additions.

vineyards.name: Cooperativa Falset Marca (Etim)
vineyards.address: Avinguda Falset, 2, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Open cellar-door shop and tasting room; tasting packs available on site.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1920, this Falset cooperative is the region's largest producer under the Etim brand, covering DO Montsant and DOQ Priorat with a wide range from everyday to premium.

vineyards.name: Torres Salmos
vineyards.address: Carretera de Gratallops s/n, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by appointment; contact via Familia Torres website.
vineyards.description: The Catalan Torres family's DOQ Priorat project in Gratallops, producing Salmos and Perpetual from Garnacha and Cariñena alongside Syrah and Cabernet Sauvignon.

vineyards.name: Venus la Universal
vineyards.address: Carretera T-734, s/n, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.owner: Sara Perez and Rene Barbier Jr
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by appointment.
vineyards.description: Sara Perez (Mas Martinet) and Rene Barbier Jr (Clos Mogador) founded this joint project in 1999, focused on DO Montsant and DOQ Priorat with organically farmed Garnacha and Cariñena.

vineyards.name: Clos Galena
vineyards.address: Carretera T-702, km 4.5, 43376 Poboleda, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by arrangement.
vineyards.description: A DOQ Priorat estate in Poboleda working Garnacha, Cariñena and Syrah on llicorella, with a range from entry-level Tres Esteles to the estate Galena bottling.

vineyards.name: Celler el Masroig
vineyards.address: Avinguda Catalunya, 20, 43736 El Masroig, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Cellar-door visits and shop in El Masroig village; advance booking recommended.
vineyards.description: Founded in 1917, this El Masroig cooperative is one of the Montsant appellation's leading producers, with the Les Sorts range from old Garnacha and Cariñena on Montsant slate.

vineyards.name: Mas d'en Brunell
vineyards.address: Carretera T-702, km 5, 43376 El Lloar, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by prior arrangement.
vineyards.description: A small DOQ Priorat estate in El Lloar working old Garnacha and Cariñena vines on the llicorella terraces above the Siurana valley.

vineyards.name: Celler Joan Simo
vineyards.address: Carrer Horta, 3, 43739 Porrera, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by arrangement; contact via DOQ winery directory.
vineyards.description: A Porrera producer working old Cariñena and Garnacha vines in the Cariñena heartland of the DOQ, known for the Les Eres old-vine range.

vineyards.name: Mas d'en Compte
vineyards.address: Carretera T-702, s/n, 43739 Porrera, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by prior appointment.
vineyards.description: A Porrera-based estate producing Cariñena-led blends from old terraced vineyards in the Porrera Vi de Vila zone, available at local retailers and through direct sales.

vineyards.name: Celler Arrels del Priorat
vineyards.address: Gratallops, 43737 Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Village-based visits by arrangement; specialises in Vi Ranci and old-vine styles.
vineyards.description: A small Gratallops producer working old Garnacha and Cariñena vines, known locally for a Vi Ranci oxidative style and white Garnacha from llicorella soils.

vineyards.name: Celler Joan Ametller
vineyards.address: Carrer Sant Roc, 2, 43376 Poboleda, Tarragona, Spain
vineyards.tasting_program: Visits by prior arrangement.
vineyards.description: A small Poboleda estate within the DOQ Priorat producing Garnacha and Cariñena from terraced llicorella plots near the Mas Doix and Clos Galena estates.
